verses.text: David gathers all the leaders and tells them his heart was set to build God's house, but God forbade it because he was a man of war. He submits to the no. Even a holy desire must yield when God assigns the work to another.

David gathers all the leaders and tells them his heart was set to build God's house, but God forbade it because he was a man of war. He submits to the no. Even a holy desire must yield when God assigns the work to another.

David gathers all the leaders and tells them his heart was set to build God's house, but God forbade it because he was a man of war. He submits to the no. Even a holy desire must yield when God assigns the work to another.

David recounts how God chose Judah, his father's house, himself, and now Solomon to build the temple and reign — if he keeps the commandments. He charges all Israel to seek and keep God's word. Privilege is bound up with faithful obedience.

David recounts how God chose Judah, his father's house, himself, and now Solomon to build the temple and reign — if he keeps the commandments. He charges all Israel to seek and keep God's word. Privilege is bound up with faithful obedience.

'And thou, Solomon my son, know thou the God of thy father, and serve him with a perfect heart... if thou seek him, he will be found of thee; but if thou forsake him, he will cast thee off.' Here is the heart of all religion: know God, seek Him, serve Him wholly.

'And thou, Solomon my son, know thou the God of thy father, and serve him with a perfect heart... if thou seek him, he will be found of thee; but if thou forsake him, he will cast thee off.' Here is the heart of all religion: know God, seek Him, serve Him wholly.

David gives Solomon the pattern of the temple — porch, chambers, treasuries, the courts and the order of priests and Levites. The design is detailed and exact. God's worship is to be built by His revealed plan, not by human invention.

David gives Solomon the pattern of the temple — porch, chambers, treasuries, the courts and the order of priests and Levites. The design is detailed and exact. God's worship is to be built by His revealed plan, not by human invention.

David gives Solomon the pattern of the temple — porch, chambers, treasuries, the courts and the order of priests and Levites. The design is detailed and exact. God's worship is to be built by His revealed plan, not by human invention.

The weights of gold and silver for every vessel are specified — lampstands, tables, all the holy things. Nothing is left to guesswork. The God of order cares about the details of His worship, and what is His deserves precise, careful provision.

The weights of gold and silver for every vessel are specified — lampstands, tables, all the holy things. Nothing is left to guesswork. The God of order cares about the details of His worship, and what is His deserves precise, careful provision.

Even the pattern of the golden cherubim is given, all of it, David says, 'the LORD made me understand in writing by his hand upon me.' Like Moses with the tabernacle, the design came from God. True worship follows the pattern He reveals.

Even the pattern of the golden cherubim is given, all of it, David says, 'the LORD made me understand in writing by his hand upon me.' Like Moses with the tabernacle, the design came from God. True worship follows the pattern He reveals.

David charges Solomon, 'Be strong and of good courage, and do it: fear not... for the LORD God, even my God, will be with thee; he will not fail thee, nor forsake thee, until thou hast finished.' God's faithful presence is the cure for fear and the surety of every work He gives.
